ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course */,
  "affiliated_by" TEXT /* Regulatory body affiliated with the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "course_fees" INTEGER /* Fees for the course */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current application status (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed eligibility criteria for the course */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements for admission (e.g., entrance exam scores) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_affiliated_by FOREIGN KEY ("affiliated_by") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory body */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the regulatory body */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the regulatory body */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the regulatory body */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the regulatory body */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the application is for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Submitted, Reviewed, Accepted) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Any remarks or comments related to the application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., Fresh, Transferred) */,
  "admission_exams" TEXT /* List of admission exams taken by the student */,
  "exam_scores" TEXT /* Scores of the admission exams */,
  "interview_status" TEXT /* Status of the interview (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interviewer" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "admission_decision_date" TEXT /* Date of the final admission decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "preferred_name" TEXT /* Preferred name for communication */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Name of the high school attended */,
  "high_school_gpa" REAL /* GPA from high school */,
  "previous_institution" TEXT /* Name of the previous institution (if applicable) */,
  "previous_degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained from the previous institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prerequisite */,
  "min_grade_required" TEXT /* Minimum grade required to meet the prerequisite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the faculty member */,
  "expertise_areas" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the faculty member */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Withdrawn) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of enrollment (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade received in the course */,
  "withdrawal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Transcript, Passport Copy) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., Uploaded, Reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_documents_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount paid for the application */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Successful, Failed) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment transaction */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of any refunds (e.g., None, Partial, Full) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who provided the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the student */,
  "review_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the review (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the review was submitted */,
  "review_device" TEXT /* Device used to submit the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
